title: Lexi's Magical Misadventures
description: A purely magic-based modpack in the modern versions of Minecraft!
body:
![Big Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f90c61aad86231ec4556c64ea9de6b206ab21b3.png)

Lexi's Magical Misadventures is a purely magic-based modpack based on the most up-to-date version of Minecraft with a sprinkle of mods on top, that create a better atmosphere and exploration feeling. I added the mods purely of off my preference of a magic modpack.

Disclaimer: Mods can be removed/added in coming updates!

The main magic mod is [Primal Magick](https://modrinth.com/mod/primal-magick).

This modpack has no questing system nor any endgoals. Just play how you want to and explore the different mods!


For any questions, mod requests, updates, bug reports and more information, contact me on Discord: **thecowempress** .
